title: Is it possible to automatically include the secure address in an email column?
excerpt: Is it possible to automatically include the secure address in an email column?

posts.author: knikou (Konstantinos Nikou)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to automatically include the secure address in an email column?

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml: What automation are you trying to create? Can you provide more information?

posts.author: knikou (Konstantinos Nikou)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to incorporate it as an email address within an automated email so that the response can be included in the conversation update.
